text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
——Flower-san taught me what secrets lied beyond speed. 
——Zephyr-san was the wind at my back, blowing down from the 
highest peak.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And just when I thought I had finally found the limits of speed! 
Beyond them, you were there, Flight-san!!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You showed me new sights! New brilliance! New excitement! 
You gave me wings to fly, so I could bakushin to far greater 
heights!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin O-chan. 
…You are the person I adore the most.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Even when I was trapped in a deep, dark tunnel, the shadows 
weighing down my feet… When it took everything I had just to 
put one foot in front of the other, you were there…

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Simply facing ahead, always running faster, faster, and faster. 
You left a trail of twinkling lights behind you, and lit up 
the path to my runway!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I am Sakura Bakushin O! Speed is the very soul of racing! 
And with that absolute speed, there is nobody I cannot outrun! 
I am a king unlike any other!!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text: I am North Flight! I wear a beautiful dress by the name of speed, tailored perfectly for me! I am a queen who will shine on forever!!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: ——And that's why we——!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
From the outside, North Flight pulls ahead!! 
Will she take the lead!? It's North Flight!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
No! Sakura Bakushin O refuses to back down! 
On the inside, Sakura Bakushin O picks up the pace once more!!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text:
——This is my race! You won't get past me! 
——I'll beat you! Because it's you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I can go faster!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text: I can go faster!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Even faster!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: ——As long as I'm racing you!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Brooches were originally invented to keep clothes fixed in place. 
…You could call them the linchpin of fashion.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Flight-san and I wanted to design such important pieces to 
reflect ourselves. Because, you see——

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: You wanted to represent the "two of you", I'm guessing?

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: You didn't want to stop at just brilliant. You wanted to go further… And that wasn't something you could accomplish alone.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! …The base designs are inspired by us as individuals… 
But when we come together as a pair—— That's when the 
design really shines.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
That's the core concept behind these outfits. 
These clothes only shine when Bakushin O-chan and I wear them 
together. No one else could ever pull them off like we do!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
From stem to stern, these outfits were truly designed as a pair. Each has 
a strong sense of individuality—— But when the two of you stand 
side by side, the design becomes complete.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Oh… It all makes sense now. When I thought about the theme "Giving You 
a Blessed Bouquet", I couldn't help but imagine the two of you 
together, and now I understand why…

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Your individual brilliances clashed in competition, your sparks flying 
and illuminating the other, and your hearts screaming out. "Because I'm 
racing you. And it has to be you".

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: What blessing could be greater than that?

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text: ……Sigh——

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
(In the end… I couldn't decide on an outfit. I feel horrible making 
their time go to waste after all the help they gave me)

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
(When the two of them explained their outfits… 
It only made me feel more lost——)

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text: ……They shone bright because it was the two of them together. ……And only because it was the two of them together——

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: ——Hey! If you don't pop that open soon, it'll get all warm, you know.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh…! 
R-Right. Thank you, Heart-san.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Wait, actually, I'm sorry! It's terribly rude of me to block the 
vending machine…! Let me get out of your way——

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it. 
I'm not here to buy a drink. I'm here for you.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text: What…?

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
Say, Tact. 
——Would you mind clearing up your schedule this weekend? 
For me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Phew…! Would this be enough vegetables for lunch? 
Excuse me, Tact-san——

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Hmm? Er, Tact-san? Heart-san——?

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Oh! 
I'll be right down, Bouquet-saaaan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Eek! Whaaaat!? You were up there!?

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
Sorry! We just happened to find a tree that was real 
tall, even by this place's standards. We were tying a 
flag up there just in case we get into an emergency.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Even if worse comes to worst and we need a helicopter to find 
us, this flag will give us peace of mind ♪ But I have to apologize 
for leaving you on your own, Bouquet-san.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Looks like you picked a whole bunch of veggies for us. Thanks! Let's head back to camp for lunch!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Y-Yes, um, let's.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
So… You will be camping in the mountains this weekend with 
Heart-san?

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
I will. She invited me to come with her. 
…It'll be a good opportunity for me to rethink things.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
(This reminds me… Ever since we went to pick out the outfits, 
there have been a few occasions where I saw Tact-san deep in thought.)

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me—— I will do my utmost to stay out of the way, so—— 
Would you be willing to let me come with you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
(I came here because I wanted to be there to talk with her when she 
needed me, but… She scarcely needs the help when these mountains are 
practically her own backyard…)

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Hey, Bouqueeet? What's up?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Oh—— I- I apologize! 
I'll be right there!
